headline: Swelling jet fuel costs hit American Airlines outlook
summary: American Airlines lowered its annual profit outlook Thursday, hitting shares while the carrier pointed to swelling jet fuel costs as a negative counterweight to healthy travel demand.American said it expects $6 billion in additional jet fuel costs in 2026.

raw.headline: Swelling jet fuel costs hit American Airlines outlook

headline: Delta Air Lines is betting big on Philippines travel
